name: Creamy Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Finely crushed pretzels (salted or unsalted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a medium bowl, stir together crushed pretzels, 1 tablespoon sugar, and melted butter. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake for 8 minutes; cool slightly.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth and creamy. Gradually beat in 1 cup sugar and cocoa.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Stir in sour cream and vanilla; blend well.
7. Pour the batter over the crust.
8. Bake for 35 minutes.
9. Turn off the oven; leave the cheesecake in the oven without opening the door for an additional 20 minutes.
10. Remove from the oven. Use a knife to loosen the cake from the side of the pan.
11. Cool completely; remove the side of the pan. Cover and refrigerate.
12. Garnish as desired. Refrigerate leftover cheesecake.
Creamy Chocolate Cheesecake Squares
Double the ingredients above for pretzel crust. Press the mixture firmly onto the bottom of a buttered 13x9x2-inch baking pan. Bake as directed. Prepare the cheesecake using the recipe above, bake for 35 minutes or until the edges are set (edges may crack slightly). Remove from the oven and cool completely on a wire rack. Cover and refrigerate.
